query_strategy: Multiple YouTube search.list requests, each targeting a specific media intent.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find explanatory video, documentary context, archival footage, or scene history.
query_candidates.q: Caribbean sound system culture Bronx hip hop origins documentary 1967 1972

request_params.q: Caribbean sound system culture Bronx hip hop origins documentary 1967 1972

query_candidates.reason: The event is a broad prehistory context, so documentary material is more likely to explain the Caribbean sound-system influence than a single song result.
review_risks: Check that results connect Caribbean sound-system practice to Bronx hip-hop rather than only covering Jamaican sound systems in isolation.
Prefer museum, archive, educational, or oral-history channels over unsourced compilations.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a DJ set, break mix, party mix, turntablism demonstration, or historically framed mix.
query_candidates.q: Caribbean sound system roots early hip hop DJ mix 1967 1972

request_params.q: Caribbean sound system roots early hip hop DJ mix 1967 1972

query_candidates.reason: A DJ mix may convey the sound-system influence as listening context, but it is unlikely to document the exact historical migration context.
review_risks: Check that the mix is historically framed and not only a modern genre blend.
Use as contextual listening, not as evidence for the event.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a YouTube playlist, mix, or curated song collection that matches the event context.
query_candidates.q: Caribbean sound system early hip hop Bronx roots playlist 1967 1972

request_params.q: Caribbean sound system early hip hop Bronx roots playlist 1967 1972

query_candidates.reason: A playlist may provide useful listening context, but this event describes influence and migration rather than one defined canon of tracks.
review_risks: Check for modern reggae or dancehall playlists that do not fit the 1967-1972 historical context.
Do not treat playlist inclusion as evidence without separate sourcing.

omitted_intents.reason: The event is about cultural influence and sound-system practice, not a specific recording or release.
No specific artist, DJ, producer, or venue is named in the event.

review_notes: Check whether results are historically relevant before adding links.
Keep all automatically found links as draft until editorial review.
Verify channel/source quality before promoting any media link to reviewed.
